script_executor_inventory.finding: legacy fixed action chooser and direct tool executor files were deleted; aiweb agent delegates natural-language goals directly to engine-run
fixed build/preview/QA/visual-critique/repair/agent-run pipeline removed; command now delegates to engine-run compatibility metadata only
deterministic local browser probe, not autonomous planning; live schema/code now use probe_generator/probe_plan/probe_results and static audit rejects static_safe_action_plan/scenario_* names
deploy/execution.rb and deploy/provenance.rb were removed; deploy now exposes engine_run_release_evidence release_gate and never uses verify-loop evidence as a deploy unlock path
eval runner no longer reports status=passed when production evidence is missing; expanded fixtures can pass only fixture gate while production_gate_status remains blocked
